center.name: 委內瑞拉海岸山脈
center.summary: 委內瑞拉海岸山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联33种鸟类，包括Band-tailed guan、紫冠雉、Venezuelan wood quail等33种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Ashy-tailed swift is endemic to Venezuela, found in deciduous forest of the eastern lowlands and the eastern Coastal Range

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of band-tailed guan is found in the eastern Andes of Colombia and western Venezuela and also in the Venezuelan Coastal Range

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is widespread in South America, where it is found in the Andes, Venezuelan Coastal Range, Santa Marta Mountains, Tepuis, most of Chile, Argentina, Paraguay, Uruguay, and eastern Brazil

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found from the Cordillera de Tilarán in northwestern Costa Rica south to the Serranía de Tabasará in western Panama. The nominate subspecies is found in northern Colombia's isolated Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta, in the Serranía del Perijá on the Colombia-Venezuela border, in several parts of the Venezuelan Coastal Range, and from the Andes of Venezuela into Colombia on the east side of that country's Eastern Andes.{{cite book | last1 =McMullan | first1 =Miles | last2 =Donegan | first2 =Thomas M

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Andes of northeastern Colombia and the Venezuelan Coastal Range

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of the blood-eared parakeet is found in the Venezuelan Coastal Range between the states of Aragua and Miranda

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in highland forest and woodland in the Andes of Bolivia, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru and Venezuela, as well as a disjunct population in the Venezuelan Coastal Range

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Caracas brushfinch is found in the Venezuelan Coastal Range from northern Guárico to Aragua.{{cite book | last =Hilty | first =Steven L

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Caracas tapaculo is found in the Venezuelan Coastal Range and separately in a small area where Sucre, Anzoátegui, and Monagas States meet

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: festiva is found in the western Venezuelan Coastal Range of Carabobo and Aragua

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies occurs in Sierra de San Luis in Falcón state and in the western part of the Venezuelan Coastal Range as far east as Aragua state

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The handsome fruiteater has a disjunct distribution; the three subspecies are found in different parts of the Venezuelan Coastal Range

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Colombia's Eastern Andes and their extension into northern Venezuela as far as Lara, in the Serranía del Perijá that also straddles the Colombia/Venezuela border, and in parts of the Venezuelan Coastal Range

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In most of its range it inhabits lowland deciduous forest but in Colombia and the Venezuelan Coastal Range it occurs in cloudforest between

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the mountains of Venezuela's Yaracuy and southern Aragua states and in the coastal mountains from Carabobo through Aragua into the Federal District

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Paria brushfinch is found in the northeastern section of the Venezuelan Coastal Ranges

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the mountains of Yaracuy state, in the section of the Coastal Cordillera from western Carabobo east to Aragua and the Capital District, and away from the coast in Miranda and in Guatopo National Park on the Miranda-Guárico border

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in wooded habitats in the highlands of the northern and central Andes and the Venezuelan Coastal Range, and in lowlands of the western Amazon

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in the isolated Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta in northern Colombia, in the Andes in the Venezuelan states of Barinas, Mérida, Trujillo, and Lara, in more northerly mountains in Lara and Yaracuy, and in the Venezuelan Coastal Range east to Miranda

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: chionogaster is found in northern Venezuela, in the Aroa Mountains and in the Coastal Range from Carabobo to northern Miranda

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: sanctaemartae is found in Colombia's isolated Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta, in the Serranía del Perijá on the Colombian-Venezuelan border, and in the Venezuelan Andes and Coastal Ranges

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in the Venezuelan Coastal Range in Anzoátegui, western Sucre and northern Monagas states

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Venezuelan parakeet is found in two separate areas of the Venezuelan Coastal Range

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Venezuelan tyrannulet is found in the Venezuelan Coastal Range between southern Lara and Miranda states

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Venezuelan Coastal Range.{{cite web |url=https://www.worldbirdnames.org/ |title=IOC World Bird List (v 11.2) |last1=Gill |first1= F

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: tucuyensis is found in the Venezuelan Coastal Ranges from Falcón and Lara east to Miranda and further east in Monagas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of white-tipped swift is found in the Venezuelan Coastal Range and separately in the Andes from extreme western Venezuela south through Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Bolivia into northern Argentina

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The northwesternmost extends from Costa Rica's Cordillera Central into western Panama's Chiriquí Province. The northeasternmost is found in the Venezuelan Coastal Ranges in Yaracuy and from Carabobo to Miranda and on the Paria Peninsula

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: vividus is found in the Serranía del Perijá on the Colombia-Venezuela border, in the Andes of Venezuela in southeastern Lara and southeastern Táchira states, and possibly in the Venezuelan Coastal Range in southeastern Carabobo

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: brunnescens is found in the Serranía del Perijá where northeastern Colombia and northwestern Venezuela meet, east around Lake Maracaibo, and also in the Venezuelan Coastal Ranges intermittenly from Falcón to Delta Amacuro.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Coastal Range as far east as Miranda state and from there southwest in the Andes of Lara, Mérida, and Táchira states and slightly into Colombia's Norte de Santander Department

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|Cali, Valle, Colombia The golden tanager is found in the Venezuelan Coastal Range in Venezuela and in the Andes in Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Bolivia at elevations of , but is most common at elevations of

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in humid montane forests, normally at elevations between , in the Andes from northern Argentina, through Bolivia, Peru, Ecuador, Colombia, to Venezuela, with isolated populations in the Venezuelan Coastal Range, Serranía del Perijá and Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta
